economic_notes: Council owns 100% of Samba K'e Development Corporation (property rental and construction). Council owns 14.27% of Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership (helicopter charter services). Samba K'e Development Corporation financial statements not available, resulting in qualified audit opinion.
notes: Qualified audit opinion issued because Samba K'e Development Corporation (100% owned subsidiary) financial statements were not available, preventing auditors from verifying equity adjustments. Fiscal year 2019 figures are restated. The nation is also recognized as municipality responsible for Community of Trout Lake, NWT. Long-term investments include negative investment in corporation of $(29,409) due to losses exceeding cost. Earnings from subsidiaries of $16,300 reflect DCHR LP share. Audit report dated February 8, 2021 for March 31, 2020 year end.
